{% set current_lang = "zh" %} {% set active_sections = namespace(value=[]) %} {% set all_sections = namespace(value=[]) %} {% if docs_top_tabs is defined and docs_top_tabs %} {% for tab in docs_top_tabs %} {% set tab_sections = tab.get("sections_zh") if current_lang == "zh" else tab.get("sections_en") %} {% set all_sections.value = all_sections.value + tab.get("sections_en", []) + tab.get("sections_zh", []) %} {% if tab.get("label_en") %} {% set all_sections.value = all_sections.value + [tab.get("label_en")] %} {% endif %} {% if tab.get("label_zh") %} {% set all_sections.value = all_sections.value + [tab.get("label_zh")] %} {% endif %} {% set prefixes = tab.get("prefixes_zh") if current_lang == "zh" else tab.get("prefixes_en") %} {% for prefix in prefixes %} {% set clean_prefix = prefix.rstrip("/") %} {% if pagename == clean_prefix or pagename.startswith(clean_prefix + "/") %} {% set active_sections.value = tab_sections %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% set nav_tree = namespace(html=furo_navigation_tree) %} {% for section in all_sections.value %} {% if section not in active_sections.value %} {% set caption = '

' ~ section ~ '

' %} {% set hidden_caption = '

' ~ section ~ '

' %} {% set nav_tree.html = nav_tree.html | replace(caption, hidden_caption) %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{{ nav_tree.html | safe }}
